sn11.4:1.0.2: ‘Bhayā nu maghavā sakka,dubbalyā no titikkhasi;Suṇanto pharusaṁ vācaṁ,sammukhā vepacittino’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.3: ‘Nāhaṁ bhayā na dubbalyā,khamāmi vepacittino;Kathañhi mādiso viññū,bālena paṭisaṁyuje’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.4: ‘Bhiyyo bālā pabhijjeyyuṁ,no cassa paṭisedhako;Tasmā bhusena daṇḍena,dhīro bālaṁ nisedhaye’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.5: ‘Etadeva ahaṁ maññe,bālassa paṭisedhanaṁ;Paraṁ saṅkupitaṁ ñatvā,yo sato upasammatī’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.6: ‘Etadeva titikkhāya,vajjaṁ passāmi vāsava;Yadā naṁ maññati bālo,bhayā myāyaṁ titikkhati;Ajjhāruhati dummedho,gova bhiyyo palāyinan’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.7: ‘Kāmaṁ maññatu vā mā vā,bhayā myāyaṁ titikkhati;Sadatthaparamā atthā,khantyā bhiyyo na vijjati.
sn11.4:1.0.8: Yo have balavā santo,dubbalassa titikkhati;Tamāhu paramaṁ khantiṁ,niccaṁ khamati dubbalo.
sn11.4:1.0.9: Abalaṁ taṁ balaṁ āhu,yassa bālabalaṁ balaṁ;Balassa dhammaguttassa,paṭivattā na vijjati.
sn11.4:1.0.10: Tasseva tena pāpiyo,yo kuddhaṁ paṭikujjhati;Kuddhaṁ appaṭikujjhanto,saṅgāmaṁ jeti dujjayaṁ.
sn11.4:1.0.11: Ubhinnamatthaṁ carati,attano ca parassa ca;Paraṁ saṅkupitaṁ ñatvā,yo sato upasammati.
sn11.4:1.0.12: Ubhinnaṁ tikicchantānaṁ,attano ca parassa ca;Janā maññanti bāloti,ye dhammassa akovidā’ti.
sn11.4:1.0.13: So hi nāma, bhikkhave, sakko devānamindo sakaṁ puññaphalaṁ upajīvamāno devānaṁ tāvatiṁsānaṁ issariyādhipaccaṁ rajjaṁ kārento khantisoraccassa vaṇṇavādī bhavissati. Idha kho taṁ, bhikkhave, sobhetha yaṁ tumhe evaṁ svākkhāte dhammavinaye pabbajitā samānā khamā ca bhaveyyātha soratā cā"ti.
